differentials.name: Papillary carcinomas < 1 cm are usually nonaggressive
differentials.raw: Papillary carcinomas < 1 cm are usually nonaggressive

differentials.name: Follicular carcinomas < 2 cm are usually nonaggressive
differentials.raw: Follicular carcinomas < 2 cm are usually nonaggressive

context: =  hemorrhagic / cystic degeneration Features associated with cancer: Growth of Thyroid Nodule =  2 mm / 10% increase (if > 20 mm) in 2 dimensions ◊  40% of benign nodules grow at least 15% by volume over 5 years ◊  Papillary microcarcinoma (< 1 cm) are incidentally detected in 10% of surgical specimens for benign disease + in 12% at autopsies ◊  The rate of metastases + invasion is the same for lesions of 8-10 mm as for lesions of 11-15 mm
